title: IIT Palakkad Summer Internships 2026
amount: ₹12,000 stipend for the internship
eligibility: Students pursuing UG or PG program
description: FSSAI Internship Programme 2026 is an opportunity offered by the Food Safety & Standards Authority of India (FSSAI) to graduate, postgraduate, and higher degree holders. The internship programme will provide interns with unique learning opportunities in various areas of food regulation of food safety administration. The selected candidates will receive a stipend of ₹10,000 per month and a certificate from the respective FSSAI (HQ)/Regional Offices/Laboratories on successful completion of the internship i.e. on submission and review of the final report/presentation.
eligibility_full: Graduate, postgraduate degree, higher degree holders Region India Award Stipend of ₹10,000 per month and a certificate Deadline Closed Home Scholarships fssai-internship-programme-2026 About The Program FSSAI Internship Programme 2026 is an opportunity offered by the Food Safety & Standards Authority of India (FSSAI) to graduate, postgraduate, and higher degree holders. The internship programme will provide interns with unique learning opportunities in various areas of food regulation of food safety administration. The selected candidates will receive a stipend of ₹10,000 per month and a certificate from the respective FSSAI (HQ)/Regional Offices/Laboratories on successful completion of the internship i.e. on submission and review of the final report/presentation. Eligibility Deadline Date: Closed To be eligible, applicants must:- be full-time students pursuing Graduate / Postgraduate / higher degree programmes from a recognised institution in India or abroad in the following disciplines: A. Science & Technology Disciplines Chemistry, Biochemistry Food Technology / Food Science & Technology Food & Nutrition, Edible Oil Technology Microbiology, Industrial Microbiology Dairy Technology Agricultural / Horticultural Sciences Toxicology, Public Health, Life Sciences, Biotechnology Fruit & Vegetable Technology Food Safety & Quality Assurance B. Management & Allied Disciplines Business Administration & Management Policy & Regulation Finance, Taxation, Economics, Statistics Marketing, Human Resource Management Psychology, Entrepreneurship Information & Communication Technology C. Media & Communication Journalism, Mass Communication, Public Relations D. Engineering & IT B.E./B.Tech (3rd & 4th year only) in Computer Science, IT, Software Engineering, or related streams E. Public Policy & Administration Postgraduate Degree/Diploma in Public Policy or Public Administration (FSSAI HQ only) F. Other Disciplines Bachelor/Master of Law Bachelor of Commerce & equivalent courses Notes:- Students who have already completed the above-mentioned courses are not eligible. Multiple applications will not be entertained. Applicants must ensure that their chosen internship location has a relevant subject/domain available. Technical roles at FSSAI Labs are open only to technically qualified candidates.
benefits: The candidates will receive a stipend of ₹10,000 per month and a certificate from the respective FSSAI (HQ)/Regional Offices/Laboratories on successful completion of the internship i.e. on submission and review of final report/presentation.
documents: Letter from the Institute confirming student status No Objection Certificate (NOC) from the Institute Character Certificate issued by the Institute Proof of educational qualifications
application_process: Eligible applicants can apply by following these steps:- Step 1: Click on the 'Apply Now' button. Step 2: Click the 'Register' button and fill in the required registration details. (Note:- If already registered, log in using Gmail/Mobile number/Email ID) Step 3: Click on the 'Apply Now' button below and read all details. Step 4: Click on the 'Register' button on the right-hand side of the dashboard and fill in the required details to Register. Step 5: Fill in the required details, upload the necessary documents and submit. More Details Important Dates Application Deadline: 27th March 2026
selection_criteria: The applicants will be selected based on the following criteria: Attendance Assessment by their respective reporting officers Evaluation of the report by the Committee Important documents Internship Detail DocumentUser ManualInternship Detail DocumentUser Manual
contact: Eligibility Graduate, postgraduate degree, higher degree holders Region India Award Stipend of ₹10,000 per month and a certificate Deadline Closed Home Scholarships fssai-internship-programme-2026 About The Program FSSAI Internship Programme 2026 is an opportunity offered by the Food Safety & Standards Authority of India (FSSAI) to graduate, postgraduate, and higher degree holders. The internship programme will provide interns with unique learning opportunities in various areas of food regulation of food safety administration. Science & Technology Disciplines Chemistry, Biochemistry Food Technology / Food Science & Technology Food & Nutrition, Edible Oil Technology Microbiology, Industrial Microbiology Dairy Technology Agricultural / Horticultural Sciences Toxicology, Public Health, Life Sciences, Biotechnology Fruit & Vegetable Technology Food Safety & Quality Assurance B. Management & Allied Disciplines Business Administration & Management Policy & Regulation Finance, Taxation, Economics, Statistics Marketing, Human Resource Management Psychology, Entrepreneurship Information & Communication Technology C. Media & Communication Journalism, Mass Communication, Public Relations D. Engineering & IT B.E./B.Tech (3rd & 4th year only) in Computer Science, IT, Software Engineering, or related streams E. Public Policy & Administration Postgraduate Degree/Diploma in Public Policy or Public Administration (FSSAI HQ only) F. Other Disciplines Bachelor/Master of Law Bachelor of Commerce & equivalent courses Notes:- Students who have already completed the above-mentioned courses are not eligible. Multiple applications will not be entertained. Applicants must ensure that their chosen internship location has a relevant subject/domain available. Technical roles at FSSAI Labs are open only to technically qualified candidates. Benefits The candidates will receive a stipend of ₹10,000 per month and a certificate from the respective FSSAI (HQ)/Regional Offices/Laboratories on successful completion of the internship i.e. on submission and review of final report/presentation. Documents Letter from the Institute confirming student status No Objection Certificate (NOC) from the Institute Character Certificate issued by the Institute Proof of educational qualifications How can you apply? Eligible applicants can apply by following these steps:- Step 1: Click on the 'Apply Now' button. Step 2: Click the 'Register' button and fill in the required registration details. (Note:- If already registered, log in using Gmail/Mobile number/Email ID) Step 3: Click on the 'Apply Now' button below and read all details. Step 4: Click on the 'Register' button on the right-hand side of the dashboard and fill in the required details to Register. Step 5: Fill in the required details, upload the necessary documents and submit. More Details Important Dates Application Deadline: 27th March 2026 Selection Criteria The applicants will be selected based on the following criteria: Attendance Assessment by their respective reporting officers Evaluation of the report by the Committee Important documents Internship Detail DocumentUser ManualInternship Detail DocumentUser Manual Terms and Conditions Multiple applications will not be entertained. Applicants who have applied for internships in previous months, need to apply afresh. The shortlisted candidates will be required to submit a short write-up/presentation for final selection. FSSAI will provide working space, internet facility and other necessities but will not cover lodging and travel facilities. FSSAI will not bear the expenses of any Boarding. All candidates are required to ensure that the place for the internship that they are opting for has the subject/topic available with the place i.e. in the case of FSSAI lab only technically qualified candidates will be eligible. Interns would be attached to one of the several Divisions at FSSAI (HQ)/ROs/Labs depending on the academic and technical training and assigned project(s) related to different aspects of Food and Nutrition Management Processes. Interns would be required to carry a letter from their institute indicating their status in the institution as a student and a 'No Objection Certificate' for allowing them to undergo Internship Program for the period for which they are selected, if applicable. A character certificate from the authority of the Institute, with proof of educational qualifications as mentioned in the application form, would also need to be submitted at the time of joining for the internship. The final list of selected candidates with the date of joining and internship tenure would be declared online on the FSSAI website by the respective office where they have opted for an internship. Interns would be required to have their own laptops. Contact Details Food Safety and Standards Authority of India 3rd & 4th Floor, FDA Bhawan, Kotla Road, Near Bal Bhawan New Delhi - 110002 Email Id: fssaiinternship@gmail.com Source: Internship Portal

title: L&T Build India Scholarship 2026
amount: ₹13,400 per month and other benefits
eligibility: B.E./B.Tech. students
description: L&T Build India Scholarship 2026 is an opportunity offered by Larsen & Toubro (L&T), a leading Indian multinational engineering and construction company. It provides financial assistance to students pursuing a Master's degree in Construction Technology & Management (M.Tech. CT&M) at IIT Delhi, IIT Madras, NIT Surathkal, and NIT Trichy. The selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of ₹13,400 for 24 months, till the course completion.
eligibility_full: B.E./B.Tech. students Region India Award ₹13,400 per month and other
benefits: Deadline Closed Home Scholarships l-t-build-india-scholarship-2026 About The Program L&T Build India Scholarship 2026 is an opportunity offered by Larsen & Toubro (L&T), a leading Indian multinational engineering and construction company. It provides financial assistance to students pursuing a Master's degree in Construction Technology & Management (M.Tech. CT&M) at IIT Delhi, IIT Madras, NIT Surathkal, and NIT Trichy. The selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of ₹13,400 for 24 months, till the course completion. Eligibility Deadline Date: Closed To be eligible, an applicant must:- be a final-year student pursuing a B.E./B.Tech degree in Civil or Electrical Engineering at IIT Delhi, IIT Madras, NIT Surathkal, and NIT Trichy be expected to graduate or be a graduate in the academic year 2026 have secured a minimum academic aggregate of 70% or a CGPA of 7.0 (out of 10) Benefits Selected scholars will receive a monthly stipend of ₹13,400 for the duration of the program. L&T will cover the entire tuition fee for the 2-year M.Tech. CT&M program. Scholars will also get the opportunity to participate in live projects at L&T construction sites, gaining valuable practical experience. Additionally, alumni of the L&T Build India Scholarship program will guide and mentor the scholars throughout their studies.
documents: A valid photo identity proof A photograph (if applicable) Class 10, 12, and B.E./B.Tech. degree certificates/marksheets Diploma certificate (if any)
application_process: Eligible applicants can apply by following these steps:- Step 1: Click on the 'Apply Now' button. Step 2: Click on the 'Register' button and fill in the required details to 'Register'. (Note - If already registered, log in using Gmail/Mobile number/Email ID.) Step 3: Click the apply option/button on the page. Step 5: Fill in the required details to 'Register'. (Note - If the applicant is already registered, log in using valid credentials.) Step 6: After successful registration, fill in the application form, upload the necessary documents, and submit. Note:- After completing the application form and uploading all required documents, submit the application. The applicants will receive an email confirmation acknowledging receipt of their submission. More Details Important Dates Application Deadline: 25th March 2025
selection_criteria: Selection will be based on an online written test (covering both subject knowledge and aptitude), followed by a personal interview with a panel from IIT and L&T. Medical fitness is a final requirement for the scholarship award.

Eligible applicants can apply by following these steps:- Step 1: Click on the 'Apply Now' button. Step 2: Click on the 'Register' button and fill in the required details to 'Register'. (Note - If already registered, log in using Gmail/Mobile number/Email ID.) Step 3: Click the apply option/button on the page. Step 5: Fill in the required details to 'Register'. (Note - If the applicant is already registered, log in using valid credentials.) Step 6: After successful registration, fill in the application form, upload the necessary documents, and submit. Note:- After completing the application form and uploading all required documents, submit the application. The applicants will receive an email confirmation acknowledging receipt of their submission. More Details Important Dates Application Deadline: 25th March 2025 Selection Criteria Selection will be based on an online written test (covering both subject knowledge and aptitude), followed by a personal interview with a panel from IIT and L&T. Medical fitness is a final requirement for the scholarship award. Terms and Conditions Employment will be offered to the selected candidates at L&T upon successful completion of the course. Upon selection and before course commencement, students are required to sign an undertaking valuing ₹5,00,000. This undertaking binds the student to complete the program and subsequently, upon selection, serve the company for five years. Contact Details Larsen & Toubro Limited Mount Poonamallee Road, Manapakkam, P.B.No.979, Chennai - 600 089 Email ID: BIS@LARSENTOUBRO.COM | Toll-Free: 1800 209 4545 Source: https://www.lntecc.com/build-india-scholarship/

title: Cambridge Digital Minds Fellowship 2026
amount: Stipend of £1,000 and other benefits
eligibility: Graduate students, postdocs, early-career academics, and professionals in relevant fields
description: The Cambridge Digital Minds Fellowship 2026 is offered by the Cambridge Digital Minds (University of Cambridge) in partnership with Rethink Priorities and PRISM. The fellowship is an intensive residential programme designed to build capacity in the digital minds space — combining technical and philosophical foundations, societal and policy thinking, and structured support for project development. Selected candidates will receive a £1,000 stipend along with fully covered travel and accommodation.
eligibility_full: Graduate students, postdocs, early-career academics, and professionals in relevant fields Region United Kingdom Award Stipend of £1,000 and other
benefits: Deadline Closed Home Scholarships cambridge-digital-minds-fellowship-2026 About The Program The Cambridge Digital Minds Fellowship 2026 is offered by the Cambridge Digital Minds (University of Cambridge) in partnership with Rethink Priorities and PRISM. The fellowship is an intensive residential programme designed to build capacity in the digital minds space — combining technical and philosophical foundations, societal and policy thinking, and structured support for project development. Selected candidates will receive a £1,000 stipend along with fully covered travel and accommodation. Eligibility Deadline Date: Closed To be eligible, an applicant must:- be a graduate student, postdoc, early-career academic, or professional in government, policy, or industry, or have a demonstrated interest in or prior engagement with AI consciousness, AI welfare, or digital minds research Note:- Exceptional earlier-stage individuals with strong demonstrated ability and commitment to digital minds questions may also be considered. Benefits The selected fellows will receive:- A stipend of £1,000 (approx. ₹1,22,762.10) Fully funded travel to and from Cambridge Fully funded accommodation at Jesus College, University of Cambridge Expert mentorship from a leading researcher in digital minds A direct invitation to the Digital Minds Strategy Workshop (Aug 8–9, 2026)

title: JN Tata Endowment Loan Scholarship 2026–27
amount: Loan scholarship offering up to INR 20 lakhs
eligibility: For students across India for higher studies abroad
description: Established in 1892 by Jamsetji Nusserwanjee Tata, the promoter of the Tata Group, the J N Tata Endowment awards merit-based loan scholarships to students across India. Every year, more than 100 scholars are selected across disciplines, ranking from the sciences (applied, pure and social), management, law and commerce, and the fine arts. JN TATA ENDOWMENT LOAN SCHOLARSHIP 2026–27
eligibility_full: Deadline:29-Mar-2026 Candidates should be Indian citizen, not older than 45 years as of June 30, 2026, and graduates of a recognised Indian university having scored at least 60% marks on average in their undergraduate or post-graduate studies. Candidates are not eligible to apply if their undergraduate degree is not from a recognised university in India. Candidates who are admitted to the course, must be recognized as a Graduate Program (post-graduate in Indian terminology). Candidates who did not get selected in the previous year/earlier for the J N Tata Endowment loan scholarship and candidates who could not avail of the loan scholarship when they were selected, are eligible to apply afresh. Candidates who are already pursuing post-graduate studies overseas may apply either at the end of their first year of studies or at the commencement of the second year, provided there is a minimum of one full academic year (12 months) remaining to be completed at the time of the loan scholarship award, typically in July of any calendar year. Candidates who are currently on break for CPT or OPT training must have two full semesters or three quarters remaining to complete their program. Candidates in the final year of their degree course and those awaiting results are eligible to apply. Candidates may apply, even if they do not have the admission/offer letter from the universities to which they have applied for the academic year 2026-2027, at the time of filling out the application form. However, they must update their application status with the Endowment once they secure admission by sending an appropriate email to jnteapplication@tatatrusts.org, quoting the reference number that appears on the top left side of the form. J N Tata scholars who have fully repaid their existing loan scholarship amount are eligible to apply. Candidates going overseas for student exchange program, seminars, conferences, training, workshops, paper presentations, undergraduate studies, and any post-graduate degree/diploma/certificates through Distance learning or online mediums are not eligible to apply. Candidates planning to pursue post-graduate and undergraduate studies in India are not eligible to apply. Candidates who are planning to study for a diploma of at least one-year duration, whose entry-level requirement is higher secondary level, are not eligible to apply.
benefits: Loan scholarship of up to 20 lakh.
documents: The entire selection process has been divided into four phases. It may please be noted that the decision of the management will be final, at each stage of the selection process, and no queries in this regard will be entertained. If the information provided by a candidate is either incomplete or false, the application will not be processed further, and the Endowment will not entertain any queries in this regard. Phase 1 – ends on March 15, 2026, the final date of submission of the application Candidate’s photo (500 * 500 pixels in jpeg format) Masked Aadhaar card Passport (first & last page) Marksheet / Transcript/s for each academic qualification Statement of Purpose (SoP) Work experience certificate from the previous employer (applicable for working professionals) Appointment letter from the existing employer (applicable for working professionals) Latest filed ITR/3 months’ pay slips (applicable for working professionals) Phase 2 –Aptitude Test No documents are required. Phase 3 – Interview with Subject Expert Letter of admission to the University A letter of Recommendation (LOR) specifically addressed to “The Trustees of the J N Tata Endowment” either from a Professor of the College or University or the employer, in case the candidate is/was working Final year mark sheets / degree certificate Scorecards (GRE/GMAT/TOEFL/IELTS/PTE) Certificate of scholarships/ranking/prizes (if any) Certificates relating to extra-curricular activities Research work/Project work Resume Cost of education Source of funds Phase 4 – Final Selection Candidate’s PAN card Candidate’s cancelled cheque / latest bank statement Guarantor’s PAN card and Masked Aadhar card Guarantor’s passport size photograph (500*500 pixels in jpeg format) Guarantor’s income proof / latest filed ITR NOTE: All documents should be uploaded in a grayscale pdf suitably named to identify the nature of the document being shared.
application_process: Click the ‘Apply Now’ button below to start the application. Kindly note that your application must be submitted through the official J N Tata Endowment website. Home Scholarships jn-tata-endowment-loan-scholarship About The Program Established in 1892 by Jamsetji Nusserwanjee Tata, the promoter of the Tata Group, the J N Tata Endowment awards merit-based loan scholarships to students across India. Every year, more than 100 scholars are selected across disciplines, ranking from the sciences (applied, pure and social), management, law and commerce, and the fine arts. JN TATA ENDOWMENT LOAN SCHOLARSHIP 2026–27 Eligibility Deadline:29-Mar-2026 Candidates should be Indian citizen, not older than 45 years as of June 30, 2026, and graduates of a recognised Indian university having scored at least 60% marks on average in their undergraduate or post-graduate studies. Candidates are not eligible to apply if their undergraduate degree is not from a recognised university in India. Candidates who are admitted to the course, must be recognized as a Graduate Program (post-graduate in Indian terminology). Candidates who did not get selected in the previous year/earlier for the J N Tata Endowment loan scholarship and candidates who could not avail of the loan scholarship when they were selected, are eligible to apply afresh. Candidates who are already pursuing post-graduate studies overseas may apply either at the end of their first year of studies or at the commencement of the second year, provided there is a minimum of one full academic year (12 months) remaining to be completed at the time of the loan scholarship award, typically in July of any calendar year. Candidates who are currently on break for CPT or OPT training must have two full semesters or three quarters remaining to complete their program. Candidates in the final year of their degree course and those awaiting results are eligible to apply. Candidates may apply, even if they do not have the admission/offer letter from the universities to which they have applied for the academic year 2026-2027, at the time of filling out the application form. However, they must update their application status with the Endowment once they secure admission by sending an appropriate email to jnteapplication@tatatrusts.org, quoting the reference number that appears on the top left side of the form. J N Tata scholars who have fully repaid their existing loan scholarship amount are eligible to apply. Candidates going overseas for student exchange program, seminars, conferences, training, workshops, paper presentations, undergraduate studies, and any post-graduate degree/diploma/certificates through Distance learning or online mediums are not eligible to apply. Candidates planning to pursue post-graduate and undergraduate studies in India are not eligible to apply. Candidates who are planning to study for a diploma of at least one-year duration, whose entry-level requirement is higher secondary level, are not eligible to apply. Benefits Loan scholarship of up to 20 lakh. Documents The entire selection process has been divided into four phases. It may please be noted that the decision of the management will be final, at each stage of the selection process, and no queries in this regard will be entertained. If the information provided by a candidate is either incomplete or false, the application will not be processed further, and the Endowment will not entertain any queries in this regard. Phase 1 – ends on March 15, 2026, the final date of submission of the application Candidate’s photo (500 * 500 pixels in jpeg format) Masked Aadhaar card Passport (first & last page) Marksheet / Transcript/s for each academic qualification Statement of Purpose (SoP) Work experience certificate from the previous employer (applicable for working professionals) Appointment letter from the existing employer (applicable for working professionals) Latest filed ITR/3 months’ pay slips (applicable for working professionals) Phase 2 –Aptitude Test No documents are required. Phase 3 – Interview with Subject Expert Letter of admission to the University A letter of Recommendation (LOR) specifically addressed to “The Trustees of the J N Tata Endowment” either from a Professor of the College or University or the employer, in case the candidate is/was working Final year mark sheets / degree certificate Scorecards (GRE/GMAT/TOEFL/IELTS/PTE) Certificate of scholarships/ranking/prizes (if any) Certificates relating to extra-curricular activities Research work/Project work Resume Cost of education Source of funds Phase 4 – Final Selection Candidate’s PAN card Candidate’s cancelled cheque / latest bank statement Guarantor’s PAN card and Masked Aadhar card Guarantor’s passport size photograph (500*500 pixels in jpeg format) Guarantor’s income proof / latest filed ITR NOTE: All documents should be uploaded in a grayscale pdf suitably named to identify the nature of the document being shared. How can you apply? Click the ‘Apply Now’ button below to start the application. Kindly note that your application must be submitted through the official J N Tata Endowment website. Apply Now FAQ’s Contact Us In case of any queries, please reach out to: 022-6665 7774 / 7198 / 7681 (Monday to Friday - 10:00AM to 06:00 PM (IST)) jnte@tatatrusts.org

title: Buddy4Study-Propelld Domestic Education Loan Programme
amount: Loan amount ranging from INR 50,000 To INR 10 Lakh
eligibility: Undergraduate and postgraduate students
description: Buddy4Study-Propelld Domestic Education Loan Programme is a joint initiative of Buddy4Study and Propelld to provide financial backing to deserving students who are pursuing or are willing to pursue higher education in India. Under this programme, the students will be offered education loan amount up to INR 10 lakh to pursue their undergraduate and postgraduate studies in India. Source: Buddy4Study and Propelld BUDDY4STUDY-PROPELLD DOMESTIC EDUCATION LOAN PROGRAMME
eligibility_full: Students should be studying in or applying to undergraduate and postgraduate programs in India in the current academic year 2023-24. Students should have secured at least 60% marks in Class 10, Class 12 and Bachelor’s courses. Applicants should be studying in universities and colleges accredited by NAAC. (Note: All NIRF ranked colleges and universities not yet accredited by NAAC are also eligible. Additionally, UGC/AICTE approved colleges and universities which are not in NAAC accredited list or NIRF rank list and are present in reputed ranking lists such as Times, India Today are also eligible.) The paying party for the applicant should be able to take the loan and should not be greater than 60 years of age at the time of loan maturity and the minimum age of the paying party is 21 years. Applicant (Parent/Student) needs to either be a New-To-Credit person or should have a good credit history. Students and their families should be permanent citizens of India.
benefits: For Students enrolled/seeking enrolment in UG/Bachelor's Program: Loan amount ranging from INR 50,000 To INR 10 Lakh will be provided to selected students at an interest rate ranging between 12-18% (Avg 14%) with tenure range between 6 months to 84 months. Note: Long-term Non-moratorium Loan will be provided only to 3rd and 4th-year students. Long-term Moratorium Loan will be provided to final-year and pre-final year Bsc/ Btech Computer Science/ IT/ Electronics students. Repayment will start immediately from the very next month. The repayment will be done in equated monthly instalments. However, during the Moratorium period simple interest will be payable monthly. For Students enrolled/seeking enrolment in PG/Masters Program: Loan amount ranging from INR 1.5 Lakh To INR 10 Lakh will be provided to selected students at an interest rate ranging between 12-18% (Avg 14%) with tenure range between 6 months to 84 months. Note: Long-term Non-moratorium Loan will be provided. In exceptional cases for meritorious candidates, moratorium loans can also be offered. Repayment will start immediately from the very next month. The repayment will be done in equated monthly instalments.
documents: KYC Documents of Applicant and Co-applicant (PAN and Aadhar) Income proof (salary slips/ ITR/ bank statements/ income certificate) Class 10, Class 12, Bachelor's Marksheet (as applicable) Profession of parent Proof of admission and fees in the educational institute for PG/UG program Any other documents that are required on case to case

Home Scholarships buddy4study-propelld-domestic-education-loan-programme About The Program Buddy4Study-Propelld Domestic Education Loan Programme is a joint initiative of Buddy4Study and Propelld to provide financial backing to deserving students who are pursuing or are willing to pursue higher education in India. Under this programme, the students will be offered education loan amount up to INR 10 lakh to pursue their undergraduate and postgraduate studies in India. Source: Buddy4Study and Propelld BUDDY4STUDY-PROPELLD DOMESTIC EDUCATION LOAN PROGRAMME Eligibility Students should be studying in or applying to undergraduate and postgraduate programs in India in the current academic year 2023-24. Students should have secured at least 60% marks in Class 10, Class 12 and Bachelor’s courses. Applicants should be studying in universities and colleges accredited by NAAC. (Note: All NIRF ranked colleges and universities not yet accredited by NAAC are also eligible. Additionally, UGC/AICTE approved colleges and universities which are not in NAAC accredited list or NIRF rank list and are present in reputed ranking lists such as Times, India Today are also eligible.) The paying party for the applicant should be able to take the loan and should not be greater than 60 years of age at the time of loan maturity and the minimum age of the paying party is 21 years. Applicant (Parent/Student) needs to either be a New-To-Credit person or should have a good credit history. Students and their families should be permanent citizens of India. Benefits For Students enrolled/seeking enrolment in UG/Bachelor's Program: Loan amount ranging from INR 50,000 To INR 10 Lakh will be provided to selected students at an interest rate ranging between 12-18% (Avg 14%) with tenure range between 6 months to 84 months. Note: Long-term Non-moratorium Loan will be provided only to 3rd and 4th-year students. Long-term Moratorium Loan will be provided to final-year and pre-final year Bsc/ Btech Computer Science/ IT/ Electronics students. Repayment will start immediately from the very next month. The repayment will be done in equated monthly instalments. However, during the Moratorium period simple interest will be payable monthly. For Students enrolled/seeking enrolment in PG/Masters Program: Loan amount ranging from INR 1.5 Lakh To INR 10 Lakh will be provided to selected students at an interest rate ranging between 12-18% (Avg 14%) with tenure range between 6 months to 84 months. Note: Long-term Non-moratorium Loan will be provided. In exceptional cases for meritorious candidates, moratorium loans can also be offered. Repayment will start immediately from the very next month. The repayment will be done in equated monthly instalments. Documents KYC Documents of Applicant and Co-applicant (PAN and Aadhar) Income proof (salary slips/ ITR/ bank statements/ income certificate) Class 10, Class 12, Bachelor's Marksheet (as applicable) Profession of parent Proof of admission and fees in the educational institute for PG/UG program Any other documents that are required on case to case How can you apply? Click on the 'Apply Now' button below. Login to Buddy4Study using a registered ID to land on the 'Online Application Form Page.' If not registered - Register at Buddy4Study with your Email/Mobile number/Gmail account You will now be redirected to the ‘Buddy4Study-Propelld Domestic Education Loan Programme' application form page. Click on the 'Start Application' button to begin the application process. Fill in the required details in the online application form. Upload the required documents. Accept the 'Terms and Conditions' and click on 'Preview.' Review the preview screen to ensure that all the filled-in details are correct. If all the details appear correctly, click on the ‘Submit’ button to complete the application process. Apply Now Contact Us In case of any queries, please reach out to: 011-430-92248 (Ext- 123) (Monday to Friday - 10:00AM to 06:00 PM (IST)) edufund.team@buddy4study.com

description: Buddy4Study Career Assesment Test is an all-in-one career guidance solution designed to help students make informed academic and career decisions. Combining the Stream Selector Test and Psychometric Test, it provides personalized insights into a student’s interests, strengths, and personality traits. Whether you're unsure about choosing between Science, Commerce, or Arts, or exploring the right career path based on your abilities, the Buddy4Study Career Assessment Test offers data-driven recommendations to guide you. With clear, actionable reports, it empowers students to align their choices with long-term goals, making career planning simpler, smarter, and more effective. Buddy4Study Psychometric Test
eligibility_full: Deadline Date: 31-Mar-2026 Candidates must have passed Class 10 or must be pursuing higher education. Programme Fee: ₹299 Note: The programme offers fee waivers to support economically underprivileged students in taking the assessment. Read more..

Students gain valuable insights about the pay scale of the recommended job, helping them decide on their future steps wisely The program also recommends academic courses that match respective career paths. The program also suggests suitable colleges or universities where candidates can pursue the recommended courses. title: vivo KanyaGyaan Scholarship Program 2025-26
amount: Fixed scholarship of INR 60,000 per year for 3 years
eligibility: For girl students enrolled in UG STEM courses
description: The vivo KanyaGyaan Scholarship Program 2025-26 is vivo India’s CSR initiative designed to empower young women from underserved and economically disadvantaged backgrounds across India to pursue education and careers in STEM (Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics) by providing financial assistance, mentorship and industry connect. The program is open to young women currently enrolled in full-time, regular STEM undergraduate courses (first or second year). This initiative enables students to continue their studies without financial barriers while building a strong foundation by receiving curated mentoring sessions which help them for corporate readiness for future STEM careers. Selected scholars will receive an annual scholarship renewable for up to three years. About vivo India vivo India commenced its journey in 2014 with a long-term vision to redefine the smartphone experience and create meaningful value in the Indian mobile ecosystem. Since then, vivo India has emerged as a leading manufacturer of smartphones and smart devices. The company’s presence today spans multiple dimensions - from manufacturing smartphones and bringin Read More... VIVO KANYAGYAAN SCHOLARSHIP PROGRAM 2025-26
eligibility_full: Deadline:31-Mar-2026 Open to young women across India who are currently enrolled in full-time, regular STEM undergraduate courses such as B.Tech / B.E., B.Sc, BCA, MBBS, etc. (first or second year) at NIRF-ranked colleges; preference will be given to government colleges. Annual parental income must not exceed INR 5 lakh from all sources. Applicants must have secured at least 70% marks in both Class 10 and Class 12, as well as in their most recent academic year/semester. Children of employees of Buddy4Study or vivo India are ineligible. Note: Students already receiving full financial assistance under other scholarships or government schemes are also not eligible. Preference will be given to the following applicants: Single-parent children Children from the Aspirational District Have deceased parents Children from SC, STs and De-Notified Tribes Priority for first-generation learners or those from marginalised communities. Children of Police Forces/Armed Forces/Martyr families Girls Representing State and National Level Sports Shortlisted candidates will be invited for a final interview conducted by a selection panel.
benefits: Selected students will receive a fixed scholarship of INR 60,000 per year for up to three years. Note: The scholarship will cover essential education-related expenses, including institution fees, hostel and accommodation, food, transport, equipment, and laptop costs, for which the scholar will submit relevant
documents: for verification as proof. Visible Passion & Aspirations expressed through a short essay / personal statement in 200 words — “Why I want to pursue this field” and “How this scholarship support will help me make an impact.”

description: Buddy4Study - Prodigy Finance Education Loan Program is a joint initiative of Buddy4Study and Prodigy Finance that provides financial backing to aspiring students who have secured admission into higher educational institutions abroad. This loan program distinguishes itself by assessing applicants' affordability based on their future earning potential rather than their current circumstances. Additionally, this program offers extensive support for students from diverse backgrounds. The average loan size changes depending on what applicants state in their loan applications. The program's smallest loan is $10,001, and the typical loan is $36,000 for each academic period. About Prodigy Finance Prodigy Finance is dedicated to making quality education more accessible. Since 2007, they have given out approximately INR 131.25 billion in loans, assisting more than 38,000 students in pursuing their overseas study ambiti Read More... BUDDY4STUDY - PRODIGY FINANCE EDUCATION LOAN PROGRAM
eligibility_full: To be eligible for Buddy4Study - Prodigy Finance Education Loan Program, applicants need to meet three basic requirements: They must be accepted into a school and program supported by Prodigy Finance. Applicants can apply for a quote before receiving their acceptance letter; proof of admission is required only when finalising the loan. Applicants must be planning to study abroad. They must reside in one of the countries supported by Prodigy Finance. (List of unsupported countries) Note: If these criteria are met, applicants can complete a quick online application to receive a quote. In most cases, the quote will be provided immediately, indicating the eligible loan amount, interest rate, loan term, and any applicable fees. If attending a school in the US: Prodigy Finance can provide funding for students living in the US, US citizens, and international students outside the US. If attending a school in the UK: Funding is available for UK residents, citizens, and international students outside the UK. If attending a school in France: Prodigy Finance cannot offer funding for students living in France who also plan to study at a French university. If attending a school elsewhere: Funding is available for students who have not resided or worked in their study country for more than 90 days before beginning their studies. This excludes France but includes Canadian provinces and territories. Students studying in certain US states like Rhode Island and Vermont may not be eligible for funding.
benefits: Buddy4Study - Prodigy Finance Education Loan Program offers loans with varying amounts, depending on the information provided in the loan application. The program's smallest loan is $10,001, while the average loan per academic period is $36,000. The maximum loan amount depends on the school's determined cost of attendance. In some situations, Prodigy Finance may offer funding for the entire program in one application. In other cases, applicants may need to apply separately for each academic period. For example, a student might borrow $45,000 for the fall semester and an additional $15,000 for the spring semester. Note: Prodigy Finance charges simple interest on loans, meaning that interest doesn't compound over the loan's lifespan. Prodigy Finance doesn't gain from increasing interest rates. They levy a processing fee of up to $100 to reserve funds and a fixed administrative fee of up to 5% of the loan amount to finalise the loan. These fees cover operational expenses. Fees are charged as follows: A processing fee of up to $100 is payable when funds are matched to the loan application to reserve the funds. An administrative fee of up to 5% of the total loan amount is added to the loan amount when issued. It's spread across monthly payments, so applicants aren't required to pay it upfront. Note: During the grace period, simple interest accrues but isn't added to the outstanding balance until the first repayment date. After that, simple interest is charged on the new balance.
documents: ​​​​​To complete the application process, Prodigy Finance requires the following documents to confirm the applicant's identity, address, school admission, and credit history: Identity Verification: Applicants are asked to upload a clear, colour scan of the identification page of their valid passport. Additionally, they must provide a selfie to match the photo in their passport. Proof of Address: A document displaying the applicant's full name and residential address, dated within the last three months, must be submitted. The address provided in the application should match the document. School Admission Confirmation: Applicants must provide a letter, I-20, or email from their school confirming their acceptance. This document should clearly state the applicant's name, school, and course details and indicate their admission status. Credit Report: Applicants must provide a copy of their credit report from a credit reference agency in their country. If they lack a credit history, they can submit a "No hit" or "No data" report instead. Note: Applicants are encouraged to read this article to gain more insight into uploading their latest credit report.
application_process: Click the ‘Apply Now’ button below. Login to Buddy4Study with your registered ID and land on the ‘Application Form Page’. Register at Buddy4Study with your email/mobile number/Gmail account if not registered. You will now be redirected to the ‘Buddy4Study - Prodigy Finance Education Loan Program’ application form page. Click on the ‘Start Application’ button to begin the application process. Fill in the required details in the online application form. Upload relevant documents. Accept the ‘

In most cases, the quote will be provided immediately, indicating the eligible loan amount, interest rate, loan term, and any applicable fees. If attending a school in the US: Prodigy Finance can provide funding for students living in the US, US citizens, and international students outside the US. If attending a school in the UK: Funding is available for UK residents, citizens, and international students outside the UK. If attending a school in France: Prodigy Finance cannot offer funding for students living in France who also plan to study at a French university. If attending a school elsewhere: Funding is available for students who have not resided or worked in their study country for more than 90 days before beginning their studies. This excludes France but includes Canadian provinces and territories. Students studying in certain US states like Rhode Island and Vermont may not be eligible for funding.
benefits: Buddy4Study - Prodigy Finance Education Loan Program offers loans with varying amounts, depending on the information provided in the loan application. The program's smallest loan is $10,001, while the average loan per academic period is $36,000. The maximum loan amount depends on the school's determined cost of attendance. In some situations, Prodigy Finance may offer funding for the entire program in one application. In other cases, applicants may need to apply separately for each academic period. For example, a student might borrow $45,000 for the fall semester and an additional $15,000 for the spring semester. Note: Prodigy Finance charges simple interest on loans, meaning that interest doesn't compound over the loan's lifespan. Prodigy Finance doesn't gain from increasing interest rates. They levy a processing fee of up to $100 to reserve funds and a fixed administrative fee of up to 5% of the loan amount to finalise the loan. These fees cover operational expenses. Fees are charged as follows: A processing fee of up to $100 is payable when funds are matched to the loan application to reserve the funds. An administrative fee of up to 5% of the total loan amount is added to the loan amount when issued. It's spread across monthly payments, so applicants aren't required to pay it upfront. Note: During the grace period, simple interest accrues but isn't added to the outstanding balance until the first repayment date. After that, simple interest is charged on the new balance.
documents: ​​​​​To complete the application process, Prodigy Finance requires the following documents to confirm the applicant's identity, address, school admission, and credit history: Identity Verification: Applicants are asked to upload a clear, colour scan of the identification page of their valid passport. Additionally, they must provide a selfie to match the photo in their passport. Proof of Address: A document displaying the applicant's full name and residential address, dated within the last three months, must be submitted. The address provided in the application should match the document. School Admission Confirmation: Applicants must provide a letter, I-20, or email from their school confirming their acceptance. This document should clearly state the applicant's name, school, and course details and indicate their admission status. Credit Report: Applicants must provide a copy of their credit report from a credit reference agency in their country. If they lack a credit history, they can submit a "No hit" or "No data" report instead. Note: Applicants are encouraged to read this article to gain more insight into uploading their latest credit report.

title: Ministry of Panchayati Raj (MoPR) Internship Scheme 2024
amount: A monthly stipend of ₹7,000 and other benefits
eligibility: Students enrolled in Undergraduate, Graduate, or Postgraduate degree programs, or Research Scholars pursuing Doctoral (Ph.D.) or Post-doctoral degree
description: The Ministry of Panchayati Raj (MoPR) Internship Scheme 2024 is an opportunity offered by the Ministry of Panchayati Raj (MoPR) for undergraduate, graduate, postgraduate, doctoral, and postdoctoral students, as well as research scholars, to gain valuable experience. Interns will be placed within program divisions of the MoPR working on the Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan (RGSA) initiative. They will be expected to utilise an evidence-based approach to conduct work related to various thematic interventions under the RGSA scheme. Selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of ₹7,000 and a certificate of completion.
eligibility_full: Students enrolled in Undergraduate, Graduate, or Postgraduate degree programs, or Research Scholars pursuing Doctoral (Ph.D.) or Post-doctoral degree Region India Award A monthly stipend of ₹7,000 and other
benefits: Deadline 31-Mar-2026 Home Scholarships ministry-of-panchayati-raj-mopr-internship-scheme-2024 About The Program The Ministry of Panchayati Raj (MoPR) Internship Scheme 2024 is an opportunity offered by the Ministry of Panchayati Raj (MoPR) for undergraduate, graduate, postgraduate, doctoral, and postdoctoral students, as well as research scholars, to gain valuable experience. Interns will be placed within program divisions of the MoPR working on the Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan (RGSA) initiative. They will be expected to utilise an evidence-based approach to conduct work related to various thematic interventions under the RGSA scheme. Selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of ₹7,000 and a certificate of completion. Eligibility Deadline Date: 31-Mar-2026 To be eligible, an applicant must:- be pursuing graduation/postgraduation/research courses/doctoral (Ph.D.)/postdoctoral degree from any recognized university/institution within India or abroad OR have completed any of the following courses from India or abroad within the last two years: Public Policy Studies Social Policy Studies Development Studies Economics Governance and Public Administration Studies Rural Development Management Business Administration Environment and Energy Studies Public Health Studies Sociology Political Science Social Work Statistics Data Analysis Other relevant Social Sciences Management Engineering Benefits The selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of ₹7,000 and a certificate of completion. Additionally, they will also be provided with a workspace, internet access, library privileges, and other essential resources for the duration of their internship.
documents: Academic transcripts including marksheets & certificates of the last qualifying examination
application_process: Eligible aaplicants can apply for the opportunity by following the below-mentioned steps: Step 1: Click on the 'Apply Now' button. Step 2: Click the 'Register' button and fill in the required registration details (Note:- If already registered, log in using Gmail/Mobile number/Email ID.) Step 3: Navigate to the 'Register Yourself' at the top of the left-hand side of the dashboard and click on it. Step 4: After successful registration, click on 'Apply for Service' and log in using valid credentials. Fill in the required details and click on the 'Submit'. Step 5: Now, click on 'View Services' and then click on 'Apply'. Step 6: Fill in the details, upload the necessary documents and submit. Apply Now Important Dates Application Deadline: 31st March 2026 The MoPR Internship Program is offered year-round based on departmental needs. However, the preferred application windows are from mid-October to the first week of December and mid-June to the third week of August.
selection_criteria: The applications will be sent to the department head of MoPR for scrutiny and shortlisting. Thereafter a committee will be formed to select the final candidates based on merit and fulfilment of the eligibility criteria. Important documents Internship Detail Document
contact: Apply Now Eligibility Students enrolled in Undergraduate, Graduate, or Postgraduate degree programs, or Research Scholars pursuing Doctoral (Ph.D.) or Post-doctoral degree Region India Award A monthly stipend of ₹7,000 and other benefits Deadline 31-Mar-2026 Home Scholarships ministry-of-panchayati-raj-mopr-internship-scheme-2024 About The Program The Ministry of Panchayati Raj (MoPR) Internship Scheme 2024 is an opportunity offered by the Ministry of Panchayati Raj (MoPR) for undergraduate, graduate, postgraduate, doctoral, and postdoctoral students, as well as research scholars, to gain valuable experience. Interns will be placed within program divisions of the MoPR working on the Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan (RGSA) initiative. They will be expected to utilise an evidence-based approach to conduct work related to various thematic interventions under the RGSA scheme. Selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of ₹7,000 and a certificate of completion. Eligibility Deadline Date: 31-Mar-2026 To be eligible, an applicant must:- be pursuing graduation/postgraduation/research courses/doctoral (Ph.D.)/postdoctoral degree from any recognized university/institution within India or abroad OR have completed any of the following courses from India or abroad within the last two years: Public Policy Studies Social Policy Studies Development Studies Economics Governance and Public Administration Studies Rural Development Management Business Administration Environment and Energy Studies Public Health Studies Sociology Political Science Social Work Statistics Data Analysis Other relevant Social Sciences Management Engineering Benefits The selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of ₹7,000 and a certificate of completion. Additionally, they will also be provided with a workspace, internet access, library privileges, and other essential resources for the duration of their internship. Documents Academic transcripts including marksheets & certificates of the last qualifying examination How can you apply? Eligible aaplicants can apply for the opportunity by following the below-mentioned steps: Step 1: Click on the 'Apply Now' button. Step 2: Click the 'Register' button and fill in the required registration details (Note:- If already registered, log in using Gmail/Mobile number/Email ID.) Step 3: Navigate to the 'Register Yourself' at the top of the left-hand side of the dashboard and click on it. Step 4: After successful registration, click on 'Apply for Service' and log in using valid credentials. Fill in the required details and click on the 'Submit'. Step 5: Now, click on 'View Services' and then click on 'Apply'. Step 6: Fill in the details, upload the necessary documents and submit. Apply Now Important Dates Application Deadline: 31st March 2026 The MoPR Internship Program is offered year-round based on departmental needs. However, the preferred application windows are from mid-October to the first week of December and mid-June to the third week of August. Selection Criteria The applications will be sent to the department head of MoPR for scrutiny and shortlisting. Thereafter a committee will be formed to select the final candidates based on merit and fulfilment of the eligibility criteria. Important documents Internship Detail Document Terms and Conditions The internship period must be a minimum of four (4) weeks and cannot exceed six (6) months. Interns must fulfill the required internship period to be eligible for a certificate of completion. Students can apply only once per calendar year. Applications are valid for the entire year in which they are submitted. Interns are required to clearly indicate their area of interest in the application form. Upon selection, interns will be required to submit a letter from their supervisor/Head of Department/Principal verifying their student status and a No Objection Certificate (NOC) permitting their participation in the internship program for the designated period. Completion certificates will only be issued upon successful completion of the internship program. Interns who do not complete the required internship period will not receive experience certificates. MoPR will cover any necessary travel expenses incurred by interns for field visits or research. MoPR reserves the right to review interns' work at any time. Selected work may be published on the official MoPR website. The MoPR Secretary holds the discretion to modify any rule or condition of the internship program. Contact Details Ministry of Panchayati Raj 11th Floor, Jeevan Prakash Building 25, K. G. Marg New Delhi - 110001 Email ID: ap.nagar@gov.in Source : https://panchayat.gov.in

If you haven't registered yet, please sign up on Buddy4Study using your email, mobile number, or Google account. Next, select the specialisation, click the ‘Search’ button, and connect with the desired university. title: Classic IAS Academy Affordable Coaching Program 2024-25
amount: ₹22,000 (66% waiver on the actual fee)
eligibility: Students seeking to pursue an IAS coaching program
description: me The Classic IAS Academy Affordable Coaching Programme 2024-25 is a joint initiative by Classic IAS Academy, one of India's premier IAS coaching institutes, and Buddy4Study. The program aims to support bright, ambitious individuals in becoming civil servants, providing high-quality IAS coaching by highly experienced faculties at an affordable price, ensuring that financial constraints do not stand in the way of their success. Under this programme , students will get a scholarship of 66% on the total course fees to pursue one-year online coaching of GS FOUNDATION COURSE for UPSC-CSE preparation. Thus the coaching fees after receiving the scholarship amount will be only ₹22,000 (Instead of the full coaching fees of ₹66,000). This coaching programme will support students with preparation of the UPSC Prelims and Main examination, which will include doubt sessions, mini-tests,test series, current affairs sessions, and personalized feedback from mentorship. Classic IAS Academy Classic IAS Academy has been a reliable choice for IAS aspirants since 2009. The academy aims to support talented individuals becoming civil servants and future leaders. Located in Bhikaji Cama Place, Delhi, it offers a comprehensive IAS coaching programme covering everything from the preliminary examination. Known for its participatory teaching approach, Classic IAS Academy provides quality offline coaching in Delhi and live online coaching for UPSC aspirants from all over India. Classic IAS Academy has assembled a highly experienced team of faculty members from reputed central universities, renowned private colleges, and other prestigious institutions. Its faculty includes researchers, professors, retired officers, fellows, and other accomplished individuals. With vast experience, in-depth content knowledge, and a strong understanding of UPSC requirements, its faculty is equipped to tailor their teaching approach to meet individual needs. Additionally, seminars and periodic workshops are organized to keep the faculty updated and empowered, ensuring they deliver the best education possible. CLASSIC IAS ACADEMY Classic IAS Academy Affordable Coaching Programme 2024-25 (Actual Cost) Actual UPSC-IAS Coaching Fees: ₹66,000 Fees After Scholarship : ₹22,000 (66% waiver on the actual fee) Coverage: Prelims - GS & CSAT | Mains - General Studies 1, 2, 3 & 4, including Essay. title: Women Involvement in Science and Engineering Research (WISER) 2026
amount: Up to ₹39 Lakhs and other benefits
eligibility: Female researchers from India and Germany
description: Women Involvement in Science and Engineering Research (WISER) 2026 is an opportunity offered by the Indo-German Science & Technology Centre (IGSTC)*. The program aims to retain and promote female researchers in the STEM field. The selected candidates will receive a grant of up to ₹39 Lakhs and other
eligibility_full: Female researchers from India and Germany Region Germany Award Up to ₹39 Lakhs and other
benefits: Deadline 31-Mar-2026 Home Scholarships women-involvement-in-science-and-engineering-research-wiser-2026 About The Program Women Involvement in Science and Engineering Research (WISER) 2026 is an opportunity offered by the Indo-German Science & Technology Centre (IGSTC)*. The program aims to retain and promote female researchers in the STEM field. The selected candidates will receive a grant of up to ₹39 Lakhs and other benefits. *The Indo-German Science & Technology Centre (IGSTC) is established by the Department of Science & Technology (DST), Government of India, and the Federal Ministry of Education and Research (BMBF), Government of Germany. Eligibility Deadline Date: 31-Mar-2026 To be eligible, an applicant must:- be a female citizen of India or Germany hold regular/long-term research positions in academia or research institutes/industry Note:- There is no age limit for this opportunity. Benefits Selected Indian fellows will receive:- ₹1,00,000 (approx) for travel, visa, and insurance fee Up to ₹12,00,000 per year towards project cost including research staff, consumables, contingency and an allowance of EUR 2300 per month in Germany. Note:- Selected candidates will receive the benefits for up to 3 years.
documents: No Objection Certificate (NOC)/Endorsement letter from the head of the institution(present organisation) Endorsement/consent letter from the Indian/German pairing collaborator
application_process: Eligible candidates can apply by following these steps:- Step 1: Click on the 'Apply Now' button below. Step 2: Click on the 'Register' button and fill in the required registration details (Note:- If already registered, log in using Gmail/Mobile number/Email ID). Step 3: Scroll down to ’How To Apply’ download the provided recommendation form and click ‘Apply Online’, then click the sign up option and register for a new account. Step 4: Fill out the required information, then click ‘Submit’. Step 5: Click the verification button sent to the provided email address and log in with valid credentials. Step 6: Fill in the required information, upload the necessary documents and submit the application. Apply Now Important Dates Application Start: 1st February 2026 Application Deadline: 31st March 2026
selection_criteria: A Joint Committee will evaluate applications based on merit and eligibility requirements, considering the qualifications of female researchers, project viability, STEM relevance, scope, content, proposal quality, anticipated results, and future potential. The Committee's decision will be regarded as final and legally binding. Important documents Application ManualProject Proposal FormatApplication Format

title: Vocational Training Fee Reimbursement for ST Students, Maharashtra 2025-26
amount: Up to 100% reimbursement of the course fee
eligibility: ST students enrolled in vocational courses under PPP scheme
description: Vocational Training Fee Reimbursement for ST Students, Maharashtra 2025-26 is an initiative by the Tribal Development Department, Government of Maharashtra, for students belonging to the Scheduled Tribe (ST) category who are admitted to seats under the PPP scheme in Government and Private ITIs through the centralised admission process. Selected students will receive 100% reimbursement of course fees.
eligibility_full: ST students enrolled in vocational courses under PPP scheme Region India Award Up to 100% reimbursement of the course fee Deadline 31-Mar-2026 Discover more Education Primary & Secondary Schooling (K-12) Educational Resources Home Scholarships vocational-training-fee-reimbursement-for-st-students-maharashtra-2025 About The Program Vocational Training Fee Reimbursement for ST Students, Maharashtra 2025-26 is an initiative by the Tribal Development Department, Government of Maharashtra, for students belonging to the Scheduled Tribe (ST) category who are admitted to seats under the PPP scheme in Government and Private ITIs through the centralised admission process. Selected students will receive 100% reimbursement of course fees. Eligibility Deadline Date: 31-Mar-2026 To be eligible, an applicant must:- be a resident of Maharashtra belong to the Scheduled Tribe (ST) category have been admitted to seats under the PPP scheme in Government or Private Industrial Training Institutes (ITIs) through the centralised admission process have an annual income above ₹2,50,000 and less than or up to ₹8,00,000
benefits: Selected candidates will receive 100% reimbursement of the course fee. However, students who have passed the SSC examination and have a family income of less than or equal to ₹2,50,000 will receive benefits according to the guidelines set by the Government of India.
documents: Required Documents as per GR: Aadhaar card Ration card Secondary School Certificate (SSC)/Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC) marksheet Domicile certificate Income certificate issued by a competent authority Original Leaving Certificate/Transfer Certificate (mandatory) Caste certificate/Caste validity certificate
application_process: Eligible applicants can apply by following these steps: Step 1: Click on the 'Apply Now' button below. Step 2: Click on the 'Register' button and fill in the required registration details. (Note: If already registered, log in using Gmail/Mobile number/Email ID). Step 3: Navigate to the 'New Applicant Registration' button on the right-hand side of the dashboard and click on it. Step 4: Fill in all required details, verify the email and the phone number, enter the captcha and click on the 'Register' button. Step 5: After successfully registering on the portal, click on the 'Applicant login' button on the right-hand side of the dashboard. Step 6: Log in using the username and password. Step 7: Fill in the necessary details, upload the required documents, and submit. Apply Now Important Dates Application Deadline: 31 March 2026
selection_criteria: Candidates will be selected based on the fulfilment of the eligibility criteria. Important documents Scholarship Guidelines (In Marathi)
contact: Apply Now Eligibility ST students enrolled in vocational courses under PPP scheme Region India Award Up to 100% reimbursement of the course fee Deadline 31-Mar-2026 Discover more Education Primary & Secondary Schooling (K-12) Educational Resources Home Scholarships vocational-training-fee-reimbursement-for-st-students-maharashtra-2025 About The Program Vocational Training Fee Reimbursement for ST Students, Maharashtra 2025-26 is an initiative by the Tribal Development Department, Government of Maharashtra, for students belonging to the Scheduled Tribe (ST) category who are admitted to seats under the PPP scheme in Government and Private ITIs through the centralised admission process. Selected students will receive 100% reimbursement of course fees. Eligibility Deadline Date: 31-Mar-2026 To be eligible, an applicant must:- be a resident of Maharashtra belong to the Scheduled Tribe (ST) category have been admitted to seats under the PPP scheme in Government or Private Industrial Training Institutes (ITIs) through the centralised admission process have an annual income above ₹2,50,000 and less than or up to ₹8,00,000 Benefits Selected candidates will receive 100% reimbursement of the course fee. However, students who have passed the SSC examination and have a family income of less than or equal to ₹2,50,000 will receive benefits according to the guidelines set by the Government of India. Important documents Scholarship Guidelines (In Marathi) Terms and Conditions The attendance criterion is mandatory and must adhere to DGT criteria. The scheme is applicable for both SSC pass and SSC fail students. The candidate must not have received any benefit from a training program sponsored by the State/Central Government, any department, local body, company, or corporation. The scheme benefits are applicable to only two children per family. Candidates will not be eligible for reimbursement if there is non-satisfactory educational progress due to misconduct, failure in the academic year, or low attendance. No fee reimbursement will be provided to students who took admission under the management quota. title: Savitribai Phule Scholarship for SC Girl Students Studying in 5 to 10, Maharashtra 2025-26
amount: Up to ₹100 per month for 10 months
eligibility: Female SC students of Classes 5 to 10
description: The Savitribai Phule Scholarship for SC Girl Students Studying in 5 to 10, Maharashtra 2025-26 is an opportunity provided by the Social Justice and Special Assistance Department, Government of Maharashtra, for female students belonging to the Scheduled Caste (SC) who are pursuing pre-matric studies. Selected candidates will receive up to ₹100 per month for 10 months.
eligibility_full: Female SC students of Classes 5 to 10 Region India Award Up to ₹100 per month for 10 months Deadline 31-Mar-2026 Discover more Educational Resources Education Home Scholarships savitribai-phule-scholarship-for-sc-girl-students-studying-in-5-to-10-maharashtra-2025 About The Program The Savitribai Phule Scholarship for SC Girl Students Studying in 5 to 10, Maharashtra 2025-26 is an opportunity provided by the Social Justice and Special Assistance Department, Government of Maharashtra, for female students belonging to the Scheduled Caste (SC) who are pursuing pre-matric studies. Selected candidates will receive up to ₹100 per month for 10 months. Eligibility Deadline Date: 31-Mar-2026 To be eligible, an applicant must:- be an Indian citizen be a resident of Maharashtra belong to the Scheduled Caste (SC) category be a female student currently studying in Classes 5 to 10 in a government/aided school Note:- All board students are eligible, except for self-financed student schools. There is no income limit for this scholarship.
benefits: Selected candidates will receive:- Classes 5 to 7: ₹60 per month for 10 months Classes 8 to 10: ₹100 per month for 10 months Note:- The scholarship will be disbursed in two instalments. Candidates can receive this scholarship for a maximum of 10 months for a single academic year. If an applicant fails a class, they will remain ineligible until passing that particular class. A minimum of 60% attendance in the current year is mandatory for receiving the second instalment. In case of less than 10 months, the candidate will receive the scholarship for the number of months they attended school, starting from the date of admission.

description: Post-Matric Scholarship to VJNT Students, Maharashtra 2025-26 is an opportunity provided by the VJNT, OBC, and SBC Welfare Department, Government of Maharashtra to financially help the students studying in Class 11 and higher. The scheme enables the Vimukta Jati and Nomadic Tribes (VJNT) category students to pursue higher education by providing them with a monthly maintenance allowance of up to ₹425 and other
eligibility_full: VJNT category students studying in Class 11 and above Region India Award A monthly maintenance allowance up to ₹425 and other
benefits: Deadline 31-Mar-2026 Home Scholarships post-matric-scholarship-to-vjnt-students-maharashtra-2025 About The Program Post-Matric Scholarship to VJNT Students, Maharashtra 2025-26 is an opportunity provided by the VJNT, OBC, and SBC Welfare Department, Government of Maharashtra to financially help the students studying in Class 11 and higher. The scheme enables the Vimukta Jati and Nomadic Tribes (VJNT) category students to pursue higher education by providing them with a monthly maintenance allowance of up to ₹425 and other benefits. Eligibility Deadline Date: 31-Mar-2026 To be eligible, an applicant must:- be an Indian citizen be a domicile of Maharashtra belong to the Vimukta Jati and Nomadic Tribes (VJNT) category be studying in Class 11 and higher in courses by the government have secured 75% attendance for the current year have an annual family income of less than or equal to ₹1,50,000 Benefits The selected scholars will receive the maintenance allowance as follows:- Course Hostlers (₹ per month) Day Scholars (₹ per month) Group A 425 190 Group B 290 190 Group C 290 190 Group D 230 120 Group E 150 90 Note:- The scholarship amount will be given to the students from the admission date to till exam completion date. The students will receive 100% of the tuition fee, exam fee, and maintenance allowance to study in government/government-aided/non-aided institutions in professional and non-professional courses. If the applicant takes an admission on or before the 20th of any month, the maintenance allowance will be issued for that current month. Otherwise, maintenance allowance will be entitled from next month. 100% benefit (tuition fees, exam fees, and maintenance allowance) is applicable for D.Ed. and B.Ed. courses. For students studying in government-aided /non-aided D.Ed. and B.Ed courses, the fee structure is applicable as per government rates for the same course. Maintenance allowance and exam fees are disbursed to the applicant upon promotion to the next higher class.
documents: Caste certificate issued by a competent authority Income certificate/declaration issued by a competent authority Caste validity certificate Marksheet of HSC or SSC or last examination Gap certificate (Not mandatory, but required in case of a gap) Father/Guardian's death certificate (if applicable) Ration card Leaving certificate Declaration certificate of parents/guardians about the number of children beneficiaries Note:- Caste validity certificate is mandatory for professional degree courses and professional postgraduate courses. However, it is not mandatory for non-professional courses. A maximum of 2 male children from a family are allowed to avail of this scholarship. For female children, this rule does not apply.
